anchor_gate.calibrated_rule: X = #{null Delta_max >= V024 committed q99} in [1, 30]; X ~ BetaBinomial(1000; 11, 991) under machinery identity (run-invalidating)
anchor_gate.registered_rule: +/-0.05 on q99 values — recorded per point; premise measured false (fresh-seed q99 SD ~0.046, see fixtures gate_calibration_disclosure)

decision.basis: N* >= 24 in 11/11 detectable cells and median Y(96)-Y(6) = 14.2125 >= 0.25
decision.rule: detectability floor (>=8/27) -> REJECT (N*<=10 in >=80% of detectable) -> APPROVE (N*>=24 in >=80% AND median Y(96)-Y(6) >= +0.25) -> NULL

familywise_gate.rule: |rate - 0.01| <= 3*sqrt(0.01*0.99/500) <=> count <= 11 at M=500; pinned leg-C handling (fixtures gate_calibration_disclosure): breach re-read at M=2000, pass iff count in [7, 33]

reporting_legs.note: registered as unable to flip the decision; evaluated against the MAIN bars with their own oracle theta
